requirement_topic.en: MGEA Mandatory Energy Label — Egypt Star-Rating Programme for Air Conditioners
requirement_topic.zh: MGEA强制能效标签——埃及空调星级评定计划
requirement_topic.zht: MGEA強制能效標籤——埃及空調星級評定計劃

summary.en: Egypt's Ministry of Electricity and Renewable Energy, through the Ministerial Group for Energy Appliances (MGEA) programme, mandates an energy efficiency star-rating label on air-conditioners sold in Egypt. The label uses a star-rating scale (typically 1–5 stars) based on measured Energy Efficiency Ratio (EER) values. The mandatory labelling programme has been in effect since 2015 and applies to split and window-type air-conditioners, including units with heat-pump function. Labels must be affixed before sale; the format, language requirements, and star-rating breakpoints are set by the Ministry of Electricity.
summary.zh: 埃及电力与可再生能源部通过MGEA（部长级能源电器小组）计划，强制要求在埃及销售的空调器上加贴能效星级标签。该标签以实测能效比（EER）值为基础，采用星级评定制度（通常为1至5星）。强制标签计划自2015年起实施，适用于分体式和窗式空调器，包括具有热泵功能的机组。标签须在销售前加贴；标签格式、语言要求和星级分档由电力部规定。
summary.zht: 埃及電力與可再生能源部通過MGEA（部長級能源電器小組）計劃，強制要求在埃及銷售的空調器上加貼能效星級標籤。該標籤以實測能效比（EER）值為基礎，採用星級評定制度（通常為1至5星）。強制標籤計劃自2015年起實施，適用於分體式和窗式空調器，包括具有熱泵功能的機組。標籤須在銷售前加貼；標籤格式、語言要求和星級分檔由電力部規定。

standards_or_laws: Egypt MGEA Mandatory Energy Labelling Programme for air-conditioners (Ministry of Electricity and Renewable Energy)
Egypt Energy Efficiency Star-Rating Label — EER-based star classification for split and window-type AC units
Mandatory since 2015 for air-conditioners sold in Egypt

summary.en: China uses the China Energy Label (CEL) administered by CNCA, which applies to room air-conditioners and heat pump appliances. The CEL uses a 1–5 grade scale (Grade 1 = most efficient) based on APF or CSPF metrics under GB 21455. The China label format, grading scale, and efficiency metric differ from the Egyptian MGEA star-rating label.
summary.zh: 中国采用由CNCA主管的中国能效标识（CEL），适用于房间空调器和热泵电器。CEL依据GB 21455采用以APF或CSPF为指标的1至5级评定（1级为最节能）。中国标识格式、评级制度和能效指标与埃及MGEA星级标签不同。
summary.zht: 中國採用由CNCA主管的中國能效標識（CEL），適用於房間空調器和熱泵電器。CEL依據GB 21455採用以APF或CSPF為指標的1至5級評定（1級為最節能）。中國標識格式、評級制度和能效指標與埃及MGEA星級標籤不同。

standards_or_laws: GB 21455 — MEPS and energy efficiency grades for room air-conditioners
APF / CSPF efficiency metrics under China GB standards

gap.en: The Egyptian MGEA star-rating label is a distinct national label that cannot be substituted by the China Energy Label. The exporter or Egyptian importer must apply for an Egyptian energy label, submit EER test data from an accepted laboratory, and affix the Egypt-format star-rating label before products are offered for sale in Egypt. Label language and format must conform to Egyptian Ministry of Electricity specifications.
gap.zh: 埃及MGEA星级标签是独立的国家标签，不能以中国能效标识替代。出口商或埃及进口商须申请埃及能效标签，向认可实验室提交EER测试数据，并在产品在埃及上市销售前加贴埃及格式的星级标签。标签语言和格式须符合埃及电力部规定。
gap.zht: 埃及MGEA星級標籤是獨立的國家標籤，不能以中國能效標識替代。出口商或埃及進口商須申請埃及能效標籤，向認可實驗室提交EER測試數據，並在產品在埃及上市銷售前加貼埃及格式的星級標籤。標籤語言和格式須符合埃及電力部規定。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — Egypt MGEA energy star-rating label required for air-conditioners sold in Egypt since 2015
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — China Energy Label (CEL) required for domestic-market air-conditioners; not recognised in Egypt

source.publisher: Ministry of Electricity and Renewable Energy, Arab Republic of Egypt

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Major gap — the Egyptian MGEA energy star-rating label is mandatory and must be obtained separately; the China Energy Label is not accepted in Egypt.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 重大差距——埃及MGEA能效星级标签为强制要求，须单独申请；中国能效标识在埃及不被接受。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 重大差距——埃及MGEA能效星級標籤為強制要求，須單獨申請；中國能效標識在埃及不被接受。

requirement_topic.en: Egypt MEPS — Minimum Energy Performance Standards (Minimum EER Threshold) for Air Conditioners
requirement_topic.zh: 埃及MEPS——空调器最低能效标准（最低EER阈值）
requirement_topic.zht: 埃及MEPS——空調器最低能效標準（最低EER閾值）

summary.en: Egypt's Minimum Energy Performance Standards (MEPS) set mandatory minimum EER (Energy Efficiency Ratio) thresholds for air-conditioners placed on the Egyptian market. Units that fail to meet the applicable EER minimum may not be imported or sold in Egypt. MEPS thresholds are set under the MGEA programme administered by the Ministry of Electricity and Renewable Energy, and are linked to the star-rating classification system — units must achieve at least the minimum star rating (corresponding to minimum EER) to qualify for sale.
summary.zh: 埃及最低能效标准（MEPS）为在埃及市场销售的空调器设定了强制性最低能效比（EER）阈值。不满足适用EER最低要求的机组不得进口或在埃及销售。MEPS阈值在电力与可再生能源部主管的MGEA计划框架下制定，与星级评定体系挂钩——机组须至少达到最低星级（对应最低EER）方可上市销售。
summary.zht: 埃及最低能效標準（MEPS）為在埃及市場銷售的空調器設定了強制性最低能效比（EER）閾值。不滿足適用EER最低要求的機組不得進口或在埃及銷售。MEPS閾值在電力與可再生能源部主管的MGEA計劃框架下制定，與星級評定體系掛鉤——機組須至少達到最低星級（對應最低EER）方可上市銷售。

standards_or_laws: Egypt MEPS — Minimum EER thresholds for air-conditioners (Ministry of Electricity and Renewable Energy / MGEA programme)
Egypt energy efficiency star-rating classification — minimum qualifying star tier linked to MEPS

summary.en: China's GB 21455 sets MEPS for room air-conditioners using APF (Annual Performance Factor) or CSPF metrics under a 1–5 grade scale; Grade 5 represents the minimum permissible efficiency for domestic-market sale. Chinese MEPS metrics (APF/CSPF) and rating scales differ from Egypt's EER-based MEPS thresholds.
summary.zh: 中国GB 21455以APF（年性能系数）或CSPF指标为基础，采用1至5级评定制度为房间空调器制定MEPS；5级为国内销售允许的最低能效。中国MEPS指标（APF/CSPF）和评级制度与埃及以EER为基础的MEPS阈值不同。
summary.zht: 中國GB 21455以APF（年性能係數）或CSPF指標為基礎，採用1至5級評定制度為房間空調器制定MEPS；5級為國內銷售允許的最低能效。中國MEPS指標（APF/CSPF）和評級制度與埃及以EER為基礎的MEPS閾值不同。

standards_or_laws: GB 21455 — MEPS for room air-conditioners (APF/CSPF based)
China Energy Label Grade 5 as domestic minimum permissible efficiency

gap.en: Egypt MEPS uses EER-based thresholds while China uses APF/CSPF metrics under GB 21455; these are not directly equivalent. Exporters must verify that the product's measured EER meets or exceeds Egypt's minimum EER requirement for the applicable capacity range before import. EER test data from an accepted laboratory may be required.
gap.zh: 埃及MEPS采用基于EER的阈值，而中国依据GB 21455使用APF/CSPF指标；两者并不直接等同。出口商须在进口前核实产品实测EER是否达到或超过埃及针对适用容量范围规定的最低EER要求。可能需要来自认可实验室的EER测试数据。
gap.zht: 埃及MEPS採用基於EER的閾值，而中國依據GB 21455使用APF/CSPF指標；兩者並不直接等同。出口商須在進口前核實產品實測EER是否達到或超過埃及針對適用容量範圍規定的最低EER要求。可能需要來自認可實驗室的EER測試數據。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — products below Egypt MEPS minimum EER threshold may not be imported or sold in Egypt
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 21455 MEPS applies to domestic-market sale; metric and threshold differ from Egypt MEPS

source.publisher: Ministry of Electricity and Renewable Energy, Arab Republic of Egypt

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Action required — verify the product's EER against Egypt's MEPS minimum EER threshold; Chinese APF/CSPF metrics from GB 21455 testing are not directly substitutable for Egyptian EER-based MEPS verification.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 需采取行动——核实产品EER是否符合埃及MEPS最低EER阈值；中国GB 21455测试的APF/CSPF指标不能直接替代埃及基于EER的MEPS验证。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 需採取行動——核實產品EER是否符合埃及MEPS最低EER閾值；中國GB 21455測試的APF/CSPF指標不能直接替代埃及基於EER的MEPS驗證。
